title: Sisters
overview: Rena's date with Yui is interrupted by a mysterious person from her past.

title: Declaration
overview: As Empress, Yui is forced to choose who she will protect. More strangers appear seeking the Regalia.

title: Sincerity
overview: Alecto is confronted by a new potential threat. Yui visits the festival, while Rena prepares a surprise for Yui.

title: Feigned Confidence
overview: Yui and Rena's relationship is tested when they encounter a visitor from Rimgarde.

title: Counterattack
overview: Yui has devised a plan to deal with the threat from Abel, and along with Rena, they must find the strength to see it through.

title: Divine Machinations
overview: Yui, Rena, Tia, and Sara are summoned to another country by an unknown Regalia. Meanwhile, Johann grows restless.

title: The Past
overview: The girls find themselves wandering the ruins of Rimgarde, when they suddenly come across Kei.

title: Returning Home
overview: Johann forces a showdown while Tia and Rena leave their Regalia to search for Kei.

title: Succession
overview: Ingrid takes up temporary residence with Yui, giving them a chance to talk about the time Ingrid met Yui's mother.

title: Isolation
overview: Tia and Sara discover someone from their past amongst Johann's dolls. Later, Yui proposes a bold plan of action!

title: Prison
overview: Rena and Yui are reunited, while Sara, Tia, Kei, and Ingrid fight off Johann's Regalia Gear.

title: Reclamation
overview: Ingrid, Kei, Tia, and Sara continue to fight, managing to free Noa. Will Yui and Rena return in time?

title: Family
overview: Yui and all of her friends face off with Johann for a decisive battle.
